title: MLOps Model Monitoring and Drift Dataset
subtitle: Synthetic production ML monitoring data for drift analysis.
description: Synthetic prediction telemetry for MLOps model monitoring, drift detection, latency analysis, error-rate tracking, model version comparison, and production ML interview practice. The dataset is generated from a fixed-seed Python script and does not contain real users, customers, credentials, systems, or production data.

resources.description: Root-level preview copy of the MLOps monitoring dataset.

fields.name: drift_period
fields.title: baseline, gradual drift, or post-drift period

fields.name: support_tickets_30d
fields.title: support tickets opened in last 30 days

fields.name: usage_hours_7d
fields.title: product usage hours in last 7 days

fields.name: prediction_score_band
fields.title: low, medium, or high risk score band

fields.name: latency_ms
fields.title: simulated model API latency in milliseconds

fields.name: drift_score
fields.title: synthetic drift severity score from 0 to 1
